effect: Start each match with +2 tokens.
tradeoff: Round 1: all bordered Hand dice lose their generation effect.

effect: At round start, may pay 1 HP to gain 3 tokens.
tradeoff: Optional action — but each use accelerates your own death.

effect: +15% chance to roll Axe faces (PRD-implemented).
tradeoff: -10% chance to roll Shield faces.

effect: Guaranteed ≥1 Shield and ≥1 Helmet per initial roll.
tradeoff: Cannot roll more than 3 total Axe/Arrow faces per roll.

effect: When below 5 HP, defensive dice block +1 extra damage each.
tradeoff: When above 10 HP, offensive dice deal -1 damage each.

effect: After dealing 5+ dice damage in a round, gain +2 tokens.
tradeoff: After dealing 0 damage in a round, lose 1 token.

effect: Every 3rd God Power activation deals +2 bonus damage (or +2 healing if defensive).
tradeoff: No direct downside — but dead in matches shorter than 4 rounds.
unlock_source: PvE: Complete any Realm at Ascension 2+

effect: Tithing Hands steal 2 tokens instead of 1.
tradeoff: Your Gilded Hands no longer generate tokens (only steal).

effect: Start with +4 HP (19 total).
tradeoff: Start with -3 tokens (minimum 0).

effect: See opponent's selected God Power before resolution phase.
tradeoff: Opponent sees one of your kept dice after your final roll.

effect: After taking 3+ damage in a round, your next round dice damage is +1.
tradeoff: Healing effects on you are reduced by 50%.

effect: Each round you don't activate a God Power, gain +1 token next round.
tradeoff: God Powers cost +1 token for the rest of the match after first activation.

effect: When reduced to ≤3 HP, all your dice rerolls become free this round.
tradeoff: When at full HP, you start each round with 1 fewer die (5 instead of 6).
unlock_source: PvE: Defeat any Realm at Ascension 5+

effect: Rolling doubles (two of any face) generates +1 token.
tradeoff: Rolling triples or higher generates 0 bonus tokens (lose the base too).

effect: See one of opponent's equipped runes at match start.
tradeoff: Opponent sees one of yours.

effect: First God Power activation per match costs -2 tokens.
tradeoff: Last God Power activation per match costs +3 tokens.

effect: If you would die, survive at 1 HP instead (once per match).
tradeoff: Cannot be healed above 50% of max HP for the rest of the match after trigger.

effect: Second use of any God Power per match costs -2 tokens.
tradeoff: First use costs +1 token.

effect: Take -1 damage from all God Power effects.
tradeoff: Take +1 damage from all dice attacks.

effect: At the end of each round, if you have fewer tokens than opponent, gain 1 token.
tradeoff: At the end of each round, if you have more tokens than opponent, lose 1 token.
